requirement_topic.en: CE Marking — Multi-Directive Framework for Air-source Heat Pumps in Ireland (NSAI)
requirement_topic.zh: CE标志——爱尔兰空气源热泵的多指令框架（NSAI）
requirement_topic.zht: CE標誌——愛爾蘭空氣源熱泵的多指令框架（NSAI）

summary.en: Air-source heat pumps placed on the Irish market require CE marking under multiple EU directives transposed into Irish law by NSAI: (1) Low Voltage Directive 2014/35/EU for electrical safety; (2) EMC Directive 2014/30/EU (S.I. No. 565 of 2016) for electromagnetic compatibility; (3) Ecodesign Regulation (EU) 2016/2281 (mandatory performance thresholds, not a CE marking directive but blocks market access for non-compliant products); (4) Pressure Equipment Directive 2014/68/EU for refrigerant pressure circuits where thresholds are met (Category II+ requires Notified Body); (5) F-gas Regulation (EU) 2024/573 (refrigerant restrictions enforced by EPA Ireland). A single Declaration of Conformity must cover all applicable directives. CE marking must appear on the product, packaging, and accompanying documentation. CCC certification does not substitute CE marking.
summary.zh: 投放爱尔兰市场的空气源热泵须依据NSAI转化的多项欧盟指令取得CE标志：（1）低压指令2014/35/EU（电气安全）；（2）电磁兼容指令2014/30/EU（S.I. No. 565 of 2016，电磁兼容性）；（3）生态设计法规（EU）2016/2281（强制性性能门槛，非CE标志指令，但不合规产品禁止市场准入）；（4）压力设备指令2014/68/EU（当制冷剂压力回路满足阈值时适用，第II类及以上须引入公告机构）；（5）氟化气体法规（EU）2024/573（制冷剂限制由EPA Ireland执行）。单一符合性声明须涵盖所有适用指令。CE标志须标注于产品、包装及随附文件。CCC认证不能替代CE标志。
summary.zht: 投放愛爾蘭市場的空氣源熱泵須依據NSAI轉化的多項歐盟指令取得CE標誌：（1）低壓指令2014/35/EU（電氣安全）；（2）電磁相容指令2014/30/EU（S.I. No. 565 of 2016，電磁相容性）；（3）生態設計法規（EU）2016/2281（強制性性能門檻，非CE標誌指令，但不合規產品禁止市場准入）；（4）壓力設備指令2014/68/EU（當制冷劑壓力迴路滿足閾值時適用，第II類及以上須引入公告機構）；（5）氟化氣體法規（EU）2024/573（制冷劑限制由EPA Ireland執行）。單一符合性聲明須涵蓋所有適用指令。CE標誌須標注於產品、包裝及隨附文件。CCC認證不能替代CE標誌。

summary.en: CCC (China Compulsory Certification), administered by CNCA, covers safety and EMC for domestic appliances in China. CCC does not have an Ecodesign seasonal performance equivalent, an F-gas refrigerant GWP restriction equivalent, or a pressure equipment category/Notified Body system equivalent to PED. The CCC mark is not recognised in Ireland or the EU and cannot substitute CE marking.
summary.zh: 由中国国家认证认可监督管理委员会（CNCA）管理的中国强制性产品认证（CCC）涵盖中国国内家用电器的安全和电磁兼容。CCC没有等同于生态设计季节性性能要求的制度，没有等同于氟化气体制冷剂GWP限制的制度，也没有等同于PED压力设备类别/公告机构体系的制度。CCC标志在爱尔兰或欧盟不被认可，不能替代CE标志。
summary.zht: 由中國國家認證認可監督管理委員會（CNCA）管理的中國強制性產品認證（CCC）涵蓋中國國內家用電器的安全和電磁相容。CCC沒有等同於生態設計季節性性能要求的制度，沒有等同於氟化氣體制冷劑GWP限制的制度，也沒有等同於PED壓力設備類別/公告機構體系的制度。CCC標誌在愛爾蘭或歐盟不被認可，不能替代CE標誌。

gap.en: CCC certification does not substitute CE marking. Separate EU conformity assessment under each applicable directive is required before the product is placed on the Irish market. The multi-directive nature of heat pump CE marking (LVD + EMC + Ecodesign + PED) means a Chinese manufacturer must address each directive independently, compile a Technical File, issue an EU Declaration of Conformity, and ensure the product has a valid EU energy label. NSAI is Ireland's designated market surveillance authority and may enforce compliance post-market.
gap.zh: CCC认证不能替代CE标志。产品投放爱尔兰市场前，须针对每项适用指令进行独立的欧盟合规评估。热泵CE标志的多指令性质（低压指令+EMC指令+生态设计+PED）意味着中国制造商须独立处理每项指令、编制技术文件、出具欧盟符合性声明，并确保产品具备有效的欧盟能效标签。NSAI是爱尔兰指定的市场监督机构，可在产品上市后进行合规执法。
gap.zht: CCC認證不能替代CE標誌。產品投放愛爾蘭市場前，須針對每項適用指令進行獨立的歐盟合規評估。熱泵CE標誌的多指令性質（低壓指令+EMC指令+生態設計+PED）意味著中國製造商須獨立處理每項指令、編制技術文件、出具歐盟符合性聲明，並確保產品具備有效的歐盟能效標籤。NSAI是愛爾蘭指定的市場監督機構，可在產品上市後進行合規執法。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (CE marking required for market placement in Ireland; NSAI is market surveillance authority)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (CCC required for domestic market; not equivalent to CE)

source.publisher: NSAI — National Standards Authority of Ireland

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — CCC certification does not substitute CE marking; separate EU conformity assessment under each applicable directive (LVD, EMC, Ecodesign, PED) required; F-gas and energy label compliance also mandatory and separate; NSAI enforces post-market in Ireland.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 重大差距——CCC认证不能替代CE标志；需针对每项适用指令（低压指令、EMC指令、生态设计、PED）进行独立的欧盟合规评估；氟化气体和能效标签合规同样为强制性且需单独处理；NSAI在爱尔兰进行上市后执法。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 重大差距——CCC認證不能替代CE標誌；需針對每項適用指令（低壓指令、EMC指令、生態設計、PED）進行獨立的歐盟合規評估；氟化氣體和能效標籤合規同樣為強制性且需單獨處理；NSAI在愛爾蘭進行上市後執法。

requirement_topic.en: SEAI Grant Eligibility — Heat Pump Products List and Registered Installer Requirement
requirement_topic.zh: SEAI补贴资格——热泵产品名单与注册安装商要求
requirement_topic.zht: SEAI補貼資格——熱泵產品名單與登記安裝商要求

summary.en: Beyond CE marking, heat pumps sold in Ireland frequently need to qualify for SEAI (Sustainable Energy Authority of Ireland) grant schemes (including the One Stop Shop scheme, the RESU — Retrofit Energy Upgrade Scheme, and the Warmer Homes Scheme) to be commercially competitive. SEAI requires: (1) the heat pump model to appear on the SEAI Heat Pump Products List (which requires submission of EN 14825 SCOP test data and manufacturer declarations directly to SEAI); and (2) the installer to hold SEAI Registered Contractor status (usually HARP or HomeBond registered). CE marking alone does not confer SEAI grant eligibility. This is a purely Irish administrative and grant-scheme requirement with no Chinese regulatory equivalent.
summary.zh: 除CE标志外，在爱尔兰销售的热泵通常需符合SEAI（爱尔兰可持续能源局）补贴计划资格（包括一站式服务计划、RESU——节能改造升级计划及暖家计划），以保持商业竞争力。SEAI要求：（1）热泵型号列入SEAI热泵产品名单（须直接向SEAI提交EN 14825 SCOP测试数据和制造商声明）；（2）安装商须持有SEAI注册承包商资质（通常为HARP或HomeBond注册）。单独取得CE标志并不赋予SEAI补贴资格。这是爱尔兰特有的行政和补贴计划要求，在中国没有对应的监管制度。
summary.zht: 除CE標誌外，在愛爾蘭銷售的熱泵通常需符合SEAI（愛爾蘭可持續能源局）補貼計畫資格（包括一站式服務計畫、RESU——節能改造升級計畫及暖家計畫），以保持商業競爭力。SEAI要求：（1）熱泵型號列入SEAI熱泵產品名單（須直接向SEAI提交EN 14825 SCOP測試數據和製造商聲明）；（2）安裝商須持有SEAI登記承包商資質（通常為HARP或HomeBond登記）。單獨取得CE標誌並不賦予SEAI補貼資格。這是愛爾蘭特有的行政和補貼計畫要求，在中國沒有對應的監管制度。

standards_or_laws: SEAI Heat Pump Products List (SEAI grant eligibility requirement)
EN 14825 (SCOP data required for SEAI listing)

summary.en: China does not have an equivalent national product listing scheme that conditions government energy grant eligibility on submission of EN 14825 SCOP data or installer registration with a designated state authority. Chinese manufacturer and installer qualification schemes (e.g. CRAA, CRAC qualifications) have no direct Irish/EU recognition.
summary.zh: 中国没有等同的国家产品名单制度，以向官方机构提交EN 14825 SCOP数据或安装商注册为政府能源补贴资格的前提条件。中国制造商和安装商资质方案（如制冷空调行业资质）在爱尔兰/欧盟没有直接对应认可。
summary.zht: 中國沒有等同的國家產品名單制度，以向官方機構提交EN 14825 SCOP數據或安裝商登記為政府能源補貼資格的前提條件。中國製造商和安裝商資質方案（如制冷空調行業資質）在愛爾蘭/歐盟沒有直接對應認可。

standards_or_laws: N/A (no Chinese equivalent for SEAI product listing scheme)

gap.en: SEAI grant eligibility is an Irish-specific commercial requirement beyond CE marking. Chinese manufacturers wishing to access the SEAI-grant-supported segment of the Irish heat pump market must: (a) submit EN 14825 SCOP test data to SEAI and obtain product listing; (b) ensure Irish installers hold SEAI Registered Contractor status; and (c) meet any SEAI-specified SCOP thresholds. There is no Chinese regulatory equivalent, and achieving EU CE marking alone is insufficient for SEAI grant-supported sales.
gap.zh: SEAI补贴资格是CE标志之外爱尔兰特有的商业要求。希望进入SEAI补贴支持的爱尔兰热泵市场的中国制造商须：（a）向SEAI提交EN 14825 SCOP测试数据并取得产品名单收录；（b）确保爱尔兰安装商持有SEAI注册承包商资质；（c）满足SEAI规定的SCOP门槛。中国没有对应的监管制度，单独取得欧盟CE标志不足以支持SEAI补贴销售。
gap.zht: SEAI補貼資格是CE標誌之外愛爾蘭特有的商業要求。希望進入SEAI補貼支持的愛爾蘭熱泵市場的中國製造商須：（a）向SEAI提交EN 14825 SCOP測試數據並取得產品名單收錄；（b）確保愛爾蘭安裝商持有SEAI登記承包商資質；（c）滿足SEAI規定的SCOP門檻。中國沒有對應的監管制度，單獨取得歐盟CE標誌不足以支持SEAI補貼銷售。

mandatory_status.target: Recommended for commercial viability (SEAI grant eligibility is not a legal market access requirement but is commercially essential in the Irish residential retrofit market)

source.publisher: SEAI — Sustainable Energy Authority of Ireland

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Ireland-specific gap — SEAI Heat Pump Products List listing and SEAI Registered Contractor installer are required for grant-supported sales; CE marking alone is insufficient; no Chinese regulatory equivalent exists.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 爱尔兰特有差距——SEAI热泵产品名单收录和SEAI注册承包商安装资质是获得补贴支持销售的前提；单独取得CE标志不够；中国没有对应的监管制度。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 愛爾蘭特有差距——SEAI熱泵產品名單收錄和SEAI登記承包商安裝資質是獲得補貼支持銷售的前提；單獨取得CE標誌不夠；中國沒有對應的監管制度。
